heading: Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs
label: 2655c Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There shall be in the Department a Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs described in , which shall be responsible for the functions described in such section and such other relevant functions related to academic, cultural, and professional exchanges as the Under Secretary for Public Diplomacy may prescribe.section 2460 of title 22

children.heading: Head of Bureau
children.label: b Head of Bureau
children.text: The Assistant Secretary for Educational and Cultural Affairs shall be the head of the Bureau of Educational and Cultural Affairs.
